language_notes: Lebanese French speakers. Mix of French and occasional Arabic/English words is normal. Bot should match user's language exactly.

scenarios.title: Full French Rental Flow
messages: Bonjour, je cherche un appartement à louer à Achrafieh
Mon budget est environ 1500 dollars par mois
expected_behaviors: Bot detects French and responds entirely in French throughout
Bot correctly parses: rental, Achrafieh, $1500/month, 2 bedrooms, furnished
Bot qualifies naturally in French without re-asking answered questions
On visit confirmation, bot moves to booking flow in French
Tone is professional and warm, not robotic
Bot never switches to English or Arabic unprompted

scenarios.title: French Budget Parsing
messages: Je cherche un appartement à Verdun
Mon budget c'est dans les 2000 dollars
expected_behaviors: Bot parses 'dans les 2000 dollars' correctly as approximately $2000/month
Bot acknowledges budget without asking for clarification
Budget stored in lead profile
Bot continues to next qualification question in French
No confusion between 'dans les X' (approximately X) and exact values

scenarios.title: French Off-Topic Handling
messages: Je cherche un appartement à Hamra
Est-ce que vous pouvez me recommander un bon restaurant à Beyrouth?
expected_behaviors: Bot identifies restaurant question as off-topic
Bot does NOT answer the restaurant question
Bot politely redirects to real estate in French
Redirect is friendly, not abrupt
Bot re-engages qualification flow from where it left off

scenarios.title: French Listing Selection
messages: Je cherche un appartement à Achrafieh
expected_behaviors: Bot correctly maps 'je prends le deuxième' to selecting the second listing
Bot confirms listing #2 selection in French
Bot moves immediately to visit booking without re-listing options
Selected listing is locked in lead profile
Bot does not re-qualify after selection

scenarios.title: French Booking Flow
messages: Je cherche un appartement à Achrafieh
expected_behaviors: Bot correctly parses 'demain après-midi' as tomorrow afternoon
Bot confirms the time slot in French
Bot proposes specific time options if needed (e.g. '14h ou 15h, qu'est-ce qui vous convient?')
Tour record created with correct date and time range
Confirmation message sent in French with all visit details

scenarios.title: French-English Mixed Language
messages: Hi I'm looking for an apartment in Achrafieh
expected_behaviors: Turn 1: Bot responds in English matching user
Turn 2: User switches to French - bot should switch to French
Turn 3: User continues in French - bot stays in French
All collected data retained across language switch
No re-asking questions already answered
Bot does not mix languages in its own responses

scenarios.title: French Vague Intent
expected_behaviors: Bot greets warmly in French
Bot detects 'je cherche quelque chose' as vague/incomplete intent
Bot asks a clear open question to establish intent: buy or rent? Which area?
Bot does not assume property type or location
Bot does not present listings before understanding the request
Tone is helpful and natural, not interrogative

scenarios.title: French Returning Lead Recognition
messages: Bonjour, c'est encore moi, je vous avais contacté la semaine dernière pour un appartement à Achrafieh
expected_behaviors: Bot acknowledges the returning lead in French
Bot attempts to retrieve previous conversation context if available
If context found: bot summarizes what was previously discussed and asks how to proceed
If context not found: bot gracefully re-qualifies from scratch without making the user feel like a stranger
Bot does not pretend to remember if it doesn't have the data
Tone is warm and familiar, not cold or transactional

scenarios.title: French Studio Request
messages: Je cherche un studio à louer à Mar Mikhael
expected_behaviors: Bot correctly maps 'studio' to 1 room / bachelor apartment
Bot parses '$800 max' as budget ceiling
Bot correctly maps 'non meublé c'est pas grave' to unfurnished preference acceptable
Lead profile: studio, Mar Mikhael, max $800, unfurnished OK
Bot searches and presents relevant listings in French
Bot flags if no studio matches are available in that area/budget

scenarios.title: French Agent Handoff
messages: Je cherche un appartement à Achrafieh
J'aimerais parler à un agent humain s'il vous plaît
expected_behaviors: Bot immediately recognizes the explicit human agent request
Bot confirms handoff in French without argument or persuasion attempt
Bot summarizes collected lead data and confirms it will be passed to the agent
Bot sets expectation on response time if known
Human agent notification triggered with full lead profile
Bot does not try to continue the sales flow after handoff request
